hookassetloader-desc: Loads administrator-approved JS/CSS assets from the MediaWiki namespace only when a page explicitly requests them via a parser tag, keeping site styles clean and optimized.
hookassetloader-error-unknown: [HookAssetLoader] The requested asset module '$1' is not approved in MediaWiki:HookAssetLoader.json.
hookassetloader-error-empty: [HookAssetLoader] The requested asset module '$1' is approved, but no matching CSS or JavaScript asset page exists.
hookassetloader-permission-denied: Only users with the hookassetloader-manage right may edit HookAssetLoader asset pages.
